tips_en: Start with the SkillClaw paper, as it introduces a novel collective skill evolution framework for LLM agents—a fundamental advance that underpins many downstream AI tasks. After that, explore NUMINA to see how counting can be enforced in video generation, and then MegaStyle to learn how large‑scale style datasets can improve controllable image style transfer.
tips_zh: 建议首先阅读 SkillClaw 论文，因为它提出了一种新颖的集体技能进化框架，能够提升 LLM 智能体的学习和适应能力，是后续研究的重要基础。随后可阅读 NUMINA，了解如何在视频生成中实现精准的物体计数，最后再阅读 MegaStyle，学习如何构建大规模、风格一致的数据集，以推动风格迁移的可控生成。
